description: Fix the Full Plugin Example code block in the Resources & Prompts guide so it passes the scaffolded plugin's own lint and format:check rules when copied verbatim into a freshly scaffolded plugin project.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Fix Full Plugin Example formatting in resources-prompts.mdx
userStories.description: As a plugin developer following the Resources & Prompts guide, I want the Full Plugin Example code block to pass `npm run lint` and `npm run format:check` when I copy it into my scaffolded plugin so that I don't encounter confusing prettier errors on my first build.
acceptanceCriteria: The Full Plugin Example code block in resources-prompts.mdx uses formatting compatible with printWidth: 120, singleQuote: true, arrowParens: 'avoid', trailingComma: 'all' (the scaffolded .prettierrc config)
The fetchJSON call in createItem's handle function fits within 120 characters or wraps at the same points prettier would choose
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
